rules: Coordinate system: X is 0 to 29 from left to right, Y is 0 to 29 from bottom to top.
You must issue exactly 2 actions per turn. They must be for different units UNLESS you only have 1 living unit left, in which case both actions go to that single unit.
Movement limits use Chebyshev distance: max(abs(dx), abs(dy)) <= max_move.
Do not issue move commands onto tiles currently occupied by any other unit.
